_why: Заземлённый словарь движений камеры под i2v (Seedance/VeoFree/Kling). Приём: РАЗДЕЛЯЕТ инструкцию камеры от контента сцены — 'меняй первый кадр, движение оставь неизменным'. Ложится 1:1 на наш стык i2v (конечный кадр → seed следующего).
_how: director.py: расширить MOTIONS ключами отсюда; в i2v-путь ({kind:generate}) инжектить поле prompt как камер-часть промпта. energy_map даёт выбор под тишину/пик (как ENERGY_MOTIONS).

static.prompt: locked-off static shot. Movement: hold one fixed camera position for the full clip.

pan_right.prompt: pan right. Movement: rotate the camera horizontally from left to right from one fixed point.

pan_left.prompt: pan left. Movement: rotate the camera horizontally from right to left from one fixed point.

whip_pan_right.prompt: whip pan right. Movement: rotate rapidly from the starting direction toward a new target on the right.

whip_pan_left.prompt: whip pan left. Movement: rotate rapidly from the starting direction toward a new target on the left.

tilt_up.prompt: tilt up. Movement: rotate the camera upward from one fixed point.

tilt_down.prompt: tilt down. Movement: rotate the camera downward from one fixed point.

slow_zoom_in.prompt: slow zoom in. Movement: slowly increase lens focal length toward a tighter frame.

slow_zoom_out.prompt: slow zoom out. Movement: slowly decrease lens focal length toward a wider frame.

fast_zoom_in.prompt: fast zoom in. Movement: quickly increase lens focal length toward the main visual target.

fast_zoom_out.prompt: fast zoom out. Movement: quickly decrease lens focal length away from the main visual target.

crash_zoom_in.prompt: crash zoom in. Movement: snap the lens rapidly toward the main visual target.

crash_zoom_out.prompt: crash zoom out. Movement: snap the lens rapidly away from the main visual target.

dolly_in.prompt: dolly in. Movement: move the camera physically forward in a straight line toward the main subject.

dolly_out.prompt: dolly out. Movement: move the camera physically backward in a straight line away from the main subject.

tracking.prompt: tracking shot. Movement: move through the scene with the main subject.

follow_behind.prompt: follow shot from behind. Movement: move behind the subject along their route at shoulder height.

reverse_tracking.prompt: reverse tracking shot. Movement: move backward in front of the walking subject.

side_tracking.prompt: side tracking shot. Movement: move parallel beside the subject along their direction of travel.

low_tracking.prompt: low tracking shot. Movement: move at ground or below-waist height alongside the subject's movement path.

vehicle_tracking.prompt: vehicle tracking shot. Movement: move with the vehicle along its route.

chase.prompt: chase shot. Movement: follow a moving subject quickly along the action route.

truck_right.prompt: truck right. Movement: move the camera physically to the right on a straight horizontal path.

truck_left.prompt: truck left. Movement: move the camera physically to the left on a straight horizontal path.

pedestal_up.prompt: pedestal up. Movement: move the entire camera vertically upward in a straight line.

pedestal_down.prompt: pedestal down. Movement: move the entire camera vertically downward in a straight line.

slider_right.prompt: slider right. Movement: slide the camera a small distance to the right.

slider_left.prompt: slider left. Movement: slide the camera a small distance to the left.

push_past.prompt: push past. Movement: move forward past a visible foreground object, edge or opening.

arc_right.prompt: arc right. Movement: move on a shallow curved path around the main subject toward the right side.

arc_left.prompt: arc left. Movement: move on a shallow curved path around the main subject toward the left side.

orbit_cw.prompt: clockwise orbit. Movement: circle clockwise around the main subject at a consistent radius.

orbit_ccw.prompt: counterclockwise orbit. Movement: circle counterclockwise around the main subject at a consistent radius.

handheld.prompt: handheld shot. Movement: hold the camera at human operator height with natural body movement.

snorricam.prompt: body-mounted Snorricam. Movement: keep the camera fixed relative to the subject's torso or face.

crane_up.prompt: crane up. Movement: travel smoothly upward through open space.

crane_down.prompt: crane down. Movement: travel smoothly downward through open space.

drone_push_in.prompt: drone push in. Movement: fly smoothly forward through open space toward the subject or destination.

drone_pull_back.prompt: drone pull back. Movement: fly smoothly backward away from the subject or destination.

helicopter.prompt: helicopter-style aerial shot. Movement: move from high altitude along a broad gradual flight path.

fpv.prompt: first-person view. Movement: move forward at human eye height from the character's perspective.

tilt_shift.prompt: tilt-shift miniature view. Movement: hold or glide from a high angled view over the scene.

infinite_zoom.prompt: infinite zoom. Movement: zoom continuously inward toward the exact center target.

earth_zoom_out.prompt: earth zoom out. Movement: pull upward from the starting point through street, city, landscape and planet.

timelapse.prompt: locked-camera time-lapse. Movement: hold one fixed camera position while time moves rapidly forward.

pass_through.prompt: pass-through movement. Movement: move forward toward a visible object, surface or barrier and continue.
